dict.string: MKDirectionsRequest
ExtendedGamepad
DirectionalGamepad
MicroGamepad
SpatialGamepad
Sierra uses the microphone to listen for the wake word and your voice commands.
Sierra uses speech recognition to transcribe and understand what you say.
Sierra uses the camera to see and respond to what you show it.
Sierra uses your location to provide location-aware assistance.
Sierra uses your location to provide location-aware assistance.
Sierra uses your location to provide location-aware assistance, including in the background.
Sierra uses your contacts to help you reach the right people.
Sierra uses your calendar to manage events and your schedule.
Sierra uses your calendar to manage events and your schedule.
Sierra uses Reminders to create and track your tasks.
Sierra uses Reminders to create and track your tasks.
Sierra accesses your photo library to view and work with your photos.
Sierra saves images and screenshots to your photo library.
Sierra accesses your media library to play and manage your music.
Sierra uses Bluetooth to connect to nearby devices and accessories.
Sierra uses Bluetooth to connect to nearby devices and accessories.
Sierra uses the local network to communicate with its backend service and nearby devices.
Sierra accesses your Desktop folder to read and manage files you ask about.
Sierra accesses your Documents folder to read and manage files you ask about.
Sierra accesses your Downloads folder to read and manage files you ask about.
Sierra accesses network volumes to read and manage files you ask about.
Sierra accesses removable volumes to read and manage files you ask about.
Sierra uses automation to control other apps on your behalf.
Sierra performs system administration tasks you request.
Sierra installs system extensions required for its features.
Sierra uses motion data to respond to movement and context.
Sierra reads health data to give you health-aware assistance.
Sierra updates health data on your behalf.
Sierra controls your HomeKit accessories.
Sierra uses Face ID to keep your assistant secure.
Sierra works with Siri to handle your requests.
Sierra uses this to personalize your experience.
Sierra uses nearby interaction to locate and connect with nearby devices.
Sierra reads your Focus status to time its notifications appropriately.
Sierra accesses your Game Center friends list.
